name: @kunlun/pi-agent-core
description: Pi-Kunlun V2 — 三进制认知驱动的 Agent 核心 (Fork of pi-agent-core)

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:types
scripts.build:js: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/index.js --format=esm --platform=node --external:@earendil-works/* --external:@kunlun/* --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module';var require=createRequire(import.meta.url);var globalThis=globalThis||{};" && esbuild src/node.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/node.js --format=esm --platform=node --external:@earendil-works/* --external:@kunlun/* --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module';var require=createRequire(import.meta.url);var globalThis=globalThis||{};"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: Mario Zechner
